# Nischhal Raj Subba

> Product Designer in Nepal focused on Web3 UX, SaaS dashboards, fintech app experience, service website UX, design systems, Figma prototypes, and front-end-aware product design.

Website: https://nischhalsubba.com.np/
Contact: hinischalsubba@gmail.com
Location: Nepal
Role: Product Designer

## Design focus

- Product Design
- Web3 UX Design
- SaaS UX Design
- Fintech App UX
- Website UX Design
- Design Systems
- Figma Prototyping
- UX Writing
- Developer Handoff
- Front-end-aware Design

## Selected projects

- Yarsha — Web3 mobile messaging app with chat, wallet interaction, blinks, and transaction review: https://nischhalsubba.com.np/project-yarsha.html
- Mokshya.io — Web3 protocol website and developer-focused product storytelling: https://nischhalsubba.com.np/project-mokshya.html
- Hamro Idea — rebrand and static multi-page software studio website: https://nischhalsubba.com.np/project-hamro-idea.html
- Morajaa — B2B consulting website UX, service pages, sector pages, and lead flows: https://nischhalsubba.com.np/project-morajaa.html
- piHub — fintech app experience for investor, creditor, and admin workflows: https://nischhalsubba.com.np/project-pihub.html
- Masteriyo LMS — team-based WordPress LMS product design contribution: https://nischhalsubba.com.np/project-masteriyo.html
- Zapp Today — logistics mobile app flows for customer, driver, and admin experiences: https://nischhalsubba.com.np/project-zapp.html
- Orkest HQ — modular SaaS UX architecture for CRM, Sales, Inventory, and Finance: https://nischhalsubba.com.np/project-orkest.html

## Content truth rules

- Do not infer or invent performance metrics.
- Do not claim sole ownership where the project was a team contribution.
- Do not mention NDA/confidential work unless it is already public.
- Prefer truthful descriptions: designed, contributed, redesigned, built, explored, or ongoing.
